scripts.deploy: npm run wrangler:generate && npm run db:migrate:remote && wrangler deploy
scripts.deploy:dashboard: npm run dashboard:prepare && wrangler pages deploy .dashboard-dist --project-name=page-speed-tester-dashboard
scripts.dev:dashboard: npm run dashboard:prepare && wrangler pages dev .dashboard-dist
scripts.db:migrate: npm run wrangler:generate && wrangler d1 migrations apply page-speed-tester-db --local
scripts.db:migrate:remote: npm run wrangler:generate && wrangler d1 migrations apply page-speed-tester-db --remote
scripts.db:migrate:list: npm run wrangler:generate && wrangler d1 migrations list page-speed-tester-db --remote
